description_long: This is a modern, armless upholstered chair with a gently curved backrest and a wide, cushioned seat. The chair is covered in a textured, taupe-gray fabric that gives it a sophisticated and neutral appearance. Its four straight, dark wooden legs provide sturdy support and contrast with the lighter fabric. The backrest is tall and slightly reclined, offering ergonomic comfort for sitting. The seat is broad and flat, with subtle stitching along the edges for a clean finish. This chair is well-suited for dining rooms, offices, or waiting areas in urban environments.
description: A modern, armless upholstered chair with a tall, curved backrest, taupe-gray fabric, and dark wooden legs. It has a wide, cushioned seat and a sleek, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, cushioned seat, tall backrest, and two front wooden legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the gentle backward curve of the backrest and the thickness of the seat cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and the two rear wooden legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the backrest's angle and seat depth.
